text: I arrive as open-source developer deciding whether to install the skill. My past: I try agent plugins carefully because bad tools clutter my local setup.

label: arrival
title: Betabots - Synthetic beta users with real product evidence

text: I see "Betabots - Synthetic beta users with real product evidence".
I think: I see a promising title, but no visible page content yet, so I am holding back.
My reaction: My first reaction is cautious interest: synthetic beta users with evidence sounds useful, but I need concrete install, docs, harness, and license details.
Idea: make the install command, supported harnesses, docs link, and license visible immediately on arrival.
Life-cost decision: Spending 1 month(s) to continue is worth it if the next view shows whether this is inspectable and extendable instead of opaque.
Truth assessment: My honest judgment is that the product sounds aligned with my goals, but I have low confidence until I can inspect the practical setup details.
